title: Social Security (Additional Payments) Act 2022, Section 1
body: Means-tested additional payments: main payments. The Secretary of State must secure that a single payment of £326 is made to a qualifying person for 25 May 2022 and a single payment of £324 is made for the second qualifying day. HMRC must secure corresponding £326 and £324 payments for qualifying child tax credit or working tax credit recipients who are not qualifying through a social security benefit.

title: Social Security (Additional Payments) Act 2022, Section 5
body: Disability additional payments. The Secretary of State must secure that a single payment of £150, called a disability additional payment, is made to each individual entitled to a payment of a disability benefit payable in respect of 25 May 2022.
